ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "token_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency token */,
  "token_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the token */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places the token supports */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of token (e.g., coin, token) */,
  "token_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the token involved in the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the token transferred */,
  "num_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions involving this token */,
  "price_usd" TEXT /* Price of the token in USD at the time of the transaction */,
  "value_usd" TEXT /* Total value transferred in USD */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date on which the transaction occurred */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address of the sender */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the token */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date for which the price is recorded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the token in USD */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_prices_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "value_date" TEXT /* Date for which the value is recorded */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the transaction in USD */,
  "value_source" TEXT /* Source of the value data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_values_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic record */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the token */,
  "analytic_date" TEXT /* Date for which the analytic is recorded */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., trading volume, price movement) */,
  "analytic_value" TEXT /* Value of the analytic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the token */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_value" TEXT /* Predicted value of the token */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization record */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the token */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data (e.g., image, chart data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tokens" (
  "user_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-token association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tokens_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_analytics" (
  "user_analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-specific analytic record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analytic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_analytics_analytic_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytic_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_predictions" (
  "user_prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-specific prediction record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_predictions_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date on which the audit event occurred */,
  "audit_event" TEXT /* Description of the audit event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date on which the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
